title: Armored Doggo
description: A mod that adds stylish armors for your beloved dogs !
body:
![Dog armor examples](https://imgur.com/ytu2mNt.png) **► Armored Doggo** is a mod made for dog lovers that dream to dress their four-legged friend with style. Explore the world and find some stylish armors for your tamed wolves burried in dungeon chests ! ► To find the armor you must explore the Mineshaft, you have 50% to find one in each chest! ► Dog armors dont exist in versions 1.20.1 or lower. If you ask about a backport your comment will be removed
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## FAQ ### Is there a place where I could give my help or suggest new ideas to the team? The main place is Discord, we recruit developers, modelers, and builders. Your suggestions are always welcome ! ### I found a mistake in the translations, what can I do ? Most of the translations were generated with AI, it's clearly possible it did some mistakes. Please report them on our Github issue tracker or directly on our Discord server. ![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Our mods
![Separator](https://i.imgur.com/yhha6Zo.png) ## Credit * **Poulpinou** - Development, models and textures. * [Minecraft Title Generator](https://ewanhowell.com/plugins/minecraft-title-generator/) from Ewan Howell has been used for the banner. [Support](https://ko-fi.com/ewanhowell) this guy, he is a goddamn hero
